title: Giant potato-shaped UFO sighting revealed in new batch of government files
description: A mysterious object resembling a giant floating potato has emerged as one of the stranger potential alien sightings detailed in a new batch of UFO files released by the Trump administration.

title: Spielberg's 'The Fabelmans': A Blend of UFO Legends and Human Drama
description: Steven Spielberg's new film draws on the Roswell and Kecksburg UFO incidents to create a compelling narrative about human response to extraterrestrial existence, empathy, and understanding.

title: The Two UFO Incidents at the Heart of Disclosure Day Are Iconic Lore for Believers
description: Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day draws on two real-world UFO legends for inspiration. Spielberg’s latest blockbuster is as much about human beings as it is about aliens; by the end of Disclosure Day, it’s clear this is a film about empathy as an evolutionary advantage. The film’s last word is addressed not to its own world, [...]

title: UFO over Zimbabwe in summer 2008 had CIA on 'high alert'
description: Zimbabwe has once again found itself at the centre of global discussions about unidentified flying objects (UFOs) following the release of newly declassified United States government documents detaili...

title: Potato-shaped UFO mystery: New Pentagon files reveal bizarre giant ‘flying spud’ case
description: A strange ‘potato-shaped’ object hovering over Colorado headlines a new batch of Pentagon UFO files, adding fresh mystery to hundreds of unexplained sightings worldwide.
